betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6FEnSU§f (Field-amplified Energy Storage Unit) is the §bultimate energy storage§f system.

§eCapacity:§f Stores massive amounts of HE - far beyond any other storage solution.

§eConstruction:§f
• Requires §bDineutronium§f components
• End-game materials needed
• Significant power infrastructure investment

§eUses:§f
• Buffer for massive power spikes
• Store energy from intermittent sources
• Support high-power machinery
• Essential for end-game operations

§aTip:§f Use FEnSU as the backbone of your late-game power infrastructure. It can handle the massive energy demands of end-game machinery.
